calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:By Court call by both parties.

Paralegal Ben Woodward for Appellant, Defendant Flexport Customs LLC the moving party.
Company representive Oliver Lucas for Respondent, Plaintiff IATBM LTD the opposing party.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties are sworn.

Paralegal Ben Woodward for Appellant, Defendant Flexport Customs LLC testifies on his behalf. The following evidence is submitted:

Company representive Oliver Lucas for Respondent, Plaintiff IATBM LTD testifies on his own behalf. The following evidence is submitted:

At the conclusion of the case, the matter is taken under submission.
Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk A. Datt, Not Recorded. (525)

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2019 Continued To Jan-29-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:

Paralegal Ben Woodward, (805)441-5609 for FlexPort Customs LLC the moving party.

No appearance by the opposing party.

This cause came on regularly for Trial De Novo. Party and witness is sworn.

Mr. Woodward testifies on behalf of Appellant FlexPort Customs LLC.
The Court reviews the exhibits within the docket that were previously submitted. No new exhibits submitted.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (525)

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Judgment Entered
